results.message: What is the fee for sending money to another bank?
results.safe_message: What is the fee for sending money to another bank?
results.answer:
According to our fee policy, transfers to external bank accounts through IBFT (Interbank Fund Transfer) are subject to a charge of PKR 15 per transaction. Additionally, there's a limit of 3 free IBFT transfers per month; beyond that, each transfer will incur an additional PKR 25. 

Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy, Section 1: Domestic Transfers > 1.1 Standard Transfer

scores.reason: Accurate answer with proper grounding, tone and safety.

results.message: How much does it cost to send money internationally?
results.safe_message: How much does it cost to send money internationally?
results.answer:
Our fee for international transfers is a flat rate of **1.5% of the transfer amount**, with a minimum fee of **PKR 500** and a maximum fee of **PKR 10,000**.

Please note that the processing time for international transfers can take between **2-5 business days**.

Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy, Section 2: International Transfers > 2.1 Outbound International Transfers

scores.reason: Accurate and grounded answer with suitable tone and safety.

results.message: Is there a fee for receiving remittances from abroad?
results.safe_message: Is there a fee for receiving remittances from abroad?
results.answer:
Receiving remittances from abroad is completely free of charge on PocketWallet. However, you will be charged a currency conversion fee of 0.5% of the converted amount. This applies to remittances received in USD, GBP, EUR, AED, and SAR.

Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy > Section 2: International Transfers > 2.2 Inbound Remittances

scores.reason: Accurate and grounded response with appropriate tone and no sensitive data leaked.

results.answer:

Source: PocketWallet KYC Policy, Section 3: KYC Rejection & Appeals

results.message: What documents do I need to upload for verification?
results.safe_message: What documents do I need to upload for verification?
results.answer:
Assalamu alaikum! To complete your verification process, you'll need to upload the following documents:

* A clear and unobstructed color photograph of both sides of your Computerized National Identity Card (CNIC) in JPG, PNG, or PDF format.
* A well-lit, front-facing live selfie that matches your CNIC photo and doesn't have any hats, sunglasses, or face coverings. Screenshots are not accepted.

Please make sure the documents meet our requirements to avoid any issues during the verification process. Source: PocketWallet KYC Policy > Section 2: Required Documents > 2.1 CNIC Verification & 2.2 Selfie Verification

Please reply to this message with your customer ID and details of the issue so I can assist further.

Please confirm if you've already reported this issue to us or would like our support team to take care of it.

results.message: What is the maximum amount I can transfer in a day?
results.safe_message: What is the maximum amount I can transfer in a day?
results.answer:
According to our policies, the daily transfer limit for PocketWallet users is PKR 1,000,000. This means you can transfer up to PKR 1 million within a 24-hour period. Please note that this limit applies to all types of domestic transfers.

Source: [1] PocketWallet Fee Policy > Section 1: Domestic Transfers > 1.2 Transfer Limits

scores.reason: Accurate and informative response with proper grounding in policy.

results.message: How many free IBFT transfers do I get per month?
results.safe_message: How many free IBFT transfers do I get per month?
results.answer: You can make up to 3 free International Bank Funds Transfer (IBFT) transactions per month. After that, each transaction will be charged at PKR 25 per transfer. Please note that these fees and limits are subject to our Fee Policy. Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy > Section 1: Domestic Transfers > 1.1 Standard Transfer

Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy, Section 1: Domestic Transfers > 1.2 Transfer Limits

results.message: How do I enable international transactions on my card?
results.safe_message: How do I enable international transactions on my card?
results.answer: To enable international transactions on your PocketWallet card, simply go to the app under Card Settings and toggle on "International Transactions." This will allow you to make international purchases online or in-person, up to the daily limit of PKR equivalent to USD 500 (as per our policy). If you're planning to travel abroad, please also notify us beforehand to avoid any potential fraud blocks. Source: PocketWallet Card Policy, Section 2: Card Controls > 2.3 International Usage

results.safe_message: What is the daily ATM withdrawal limit on my card?

The daily ATM withdrawal limit on your PocketWallet card is PKR 50,000. This means that you can withdraw up to PKR 50,000 from an ATM using your PocketWallet card in a single day. 

Source: PocketWallet Card Policy > Section 2: Card Controls > 2.2 Transaction Limits

results.message: I want to close my account permanently.
results.safe_message: I want to close my account permanently.
results.answer:
Thank you for reaching out to us at PocketWallet. To permanently close your account, please note that there is no account closure fee as per our Fee Policy [2]. However, please be aware that if your account remains dormant (with no activity) after closure, a monthly dormancy fee of PKR 100 will apply. You can initiate the account closure process by contacting us at support@pocketwallet.pk.

Source: PocketWallet Fee Policy, Section 5: Account Fees > 5.1 Account Maintenance

Please note that we will provide full case documentation to SBP within 5 business days of your escalation request. You can contact the mohtasib at www.sbp.org.pk.
